# Leonobitech

> Leonobitech is a development studio specializing in MCP-native AI applications, agent development, and workflow automation. We build production-ready AI agents using Model Context Protocol (MCP), AgentKit, LangGraph, and custom SDKs.

## About

Leonobitech helps businesses launch AI-powered applications with:
- Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations
- Custom AI agent development
- Workflow automation with n8n
- SDK development and integration
- Production infrastructure setup

Founded by Felix Figueroa, we focus on building the next generation of MCP-native AI apps.

## Services

- MCP Server Development: Custom Model Context Protocol servers for AI tool integration
- Agent Development: Production-ready AI agents with AgentKit and LangGraph
- Workflow Automation: n8n workflows with scalable architecture
- SDK Integration: Custom SDK development for AI applications
- Infrastructure: Traefik, Redis, PostgreSQL setups for AI workloads

## Docs

- [Home](https://www.leonobitech.com/): Main landing page with service overview
- [Gallery](https://www.leonobitech.com/gallery): MCP-powered experiments, LinkedIn drops, and SDK builds
- [Blog](https://www.leonobitech.com/blog): Technical articles on MCP, Rust, and AI development
- [Podcasts](https://www.leonobitech.com/podcasts): Conversations on agents, automation, and AI builders
- [Projects](https://www.leonobitech.com/projects): Active projects and MCP automations
- [Community](https://www.leonobitech.com/community): Join the Leonobitech community
- [About](https://www.leonobitech.com/about): Company information and team
- [Contact](https://www.leonobitech.com/contact): Get in touch for MCP builds

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4
- Backend: Express 5, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL, Redis
- AI/MCP: Model Context Protocol, AgentKit, LangGraph
- Infrastructure: Docker, Traefik, n8n
